metrics.gates_first_pass_note: goimports formatting in audit_test.go — fixed and all gates passed on re-run

hypotheses.name: 3-phase sprint works across project types
hypotheses.evidence: Fourth implementation sprint completed cleanly. Audit logging plugin delivered with PostBind, PostFilter, Logger, and 8 new test functions in one session.

hypotheses.name: Gates catch real issues
hypotheses.evidence: Lint gate caught goimports formatting issue in audit_test.go on first run. Fixed immediately, all 4 gates passed on re-run. First gates_first_pass=false in the project — demonstrates the gate is catching real issues.

hypotheses.name: Skills are followed by agents
hypotheses.evidence: 5/5 H7 audit items passed. Security (no secrets in logs), testing (behavior-based assertions on JSON content), architecture (io.Writer interface for log output), UX (INFO summaries, DEBUG details), PM (failure/error/edge case test scenarios).

hypotheses.name: Flowstate works for greenfield projects
hypotheses.evidence: Fifth sprint on greenfield project. Active time 15m 32s, 714 LOC, new plugin package added. Process overhead minimal — conventions and patterns fully established.

hypotheses.name: Skills generalize across languages
hypotheses.evidence: All 5 skill instructions audited were language-agnostic (no secrets in logs, test behavior not implementation, interfaces for side effects, progressive disclosure, adversarial test scenarios). All applied cleanly to Go without adaptation.
